model._hint: Fine-tune: ogkalu/Comic-Diffusion v2 (SD 1.5 base). All 6 comic styles trained simultaneously. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 20–30 steps. 25 is a solid default. | CFG 7–8 recommended. | SD 1.5 native 512×512.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates editorial comic illustrations in the style of James Daly — detailed ink-based linework, expressive shading, and dynamic compositions typical of literary graphic novels.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: 'jamesdaly artstyle' must appear in every prompt. Examples: 'a detective in a rainy city, jamesdaly artstyle', 'an astronaut on an alien planet, jamesdaly artstyle', 'a pirate ship at sea, jamesdaly artstyle'.
